archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Customized strictly to user image reference)

rules: Headings must be bold and compact.
Labels and numbers should use tabular-nums where possible.

spacing.mobileViewport: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-[100dvh] relative bg-white shadow-xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col

mktButton.classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-20 bg-[#1A4DFF] text-white rounded-md active:bg-[#1A4DFF]/90 transition-colors

lmtButton.classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-20 bg-[#0F1F4D] text-white rounded-md active:bg-[#0F1F4D]/90 transition-colors

partialButton.classes: flex items-center justify-center h-14 bg-[#B91C1C] text-white font-bold uppercase text-sm rounded-md active:bg-[#B91C1C]/90 transition-colors

allButton.classes: flex items-center justify-center w-full h-14 bg-[#EF4444] text-white font-bold uppercase text-sm rounded-md active:bg-[#EF4444]/90 transition-colors

capitalCard.classes: p-4 bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-lg shadow-sm space-y-2 mb-4
capitalCard.dottedSeparator: flex-1 border-b-2 border-dotted border-[#E5E7EB] mx-2 relative top-[-4px]
capitalCard.label: text-sm text-[#6B7280]

positionRow.classes: py-3 border-b border-[#E5E7EB] flex justify-between items-center
positionRow.tag: text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[#1A4DFF]/10 text-[#1A4DFF] font-bold inline-block ml-2 uppercase

presetRow.classes: flex justify-between items-center py-4 border-b border-[#E5E7EB]
presetRow.title: text-xs font-bold text-[#6B7280] uppercase tracking-wider

login.layout: flex flex-col justify-center px-6 py-12 flex-1 space-y-6

header.classes: flex justify-between items-center p-4 border-b border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white sticky top-0 z-30
header.left: flex items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer font-bold text-lg

stickyFooter.classes: sticky bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-[#E5E7EB] p-4 shadow-[0_-10px_15px_-3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] z-40
stickyFooter.maxLossPill: px-3 py-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-full text-xs font-bold text-[#000000]

presetUpdation.bottomActions: flex justify-between mt-auto p-4 border-t border-[#E5E7EB]
presetUpdation.deleteBtn: text-[#9CA3AF] font-bold text-sm uppercase px-4 py-2
presetUpdation.updateBtn: text-[#1A4DFF] font-bold text-sm uppercase px-4 py-2

orderHistory.listGrouping: Group by date. Date headers text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase font-bold py-2 bg-gray-50

statusPills.executed: bg-green-100 text-green-800 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-bold
statusPills.cancelled: bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-bold
statusPills.rejected: bg-red-100 text-[#B91C1C] text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-bold

settings.logoutButton: mt-8 w-full py-4 text-center text-[#EF4444] font-bold uppercase border border-[#EF4444] rounded-md

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js to strictly use Arial as the default sans font: `fontFamily: { sans: ['Arial', 'sans-serif'] }`
CRITICAL: Do NOT use green for positive PnL. Use #1A4DFF (Royal Blue) everywhere for positive PnL to match the provided screenshot reference exactly.

CRITICAL: Strictly adhere to the Mobile Web App form-factor. Since we use standard web tech, wrap the entire app in `<div className='max-w-md mx-auto min-h-[100dvh] relative bg-white shadow-xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col'>` to simulate the mobile view on desktop browsers.
Use Shadcn Dialogs, Sheets, or custom bottom-anchored modals for preset edit screens, underlying search, and order confirmations to simulate native mobile bottom sheets.
Ensure the Buy Grid buttons in the home sticky footer are massive (h-20) and easily tappable, as this is a fast-action scalping utility.
Use pure CSS dotted borders for the Capital Card rows (`border-bottom: 2px dotted #E5E7EB`).
Kebab menu should be implemented using Shadcn DropdownMenu on the top right header, containing: Settings, Order History, Refresh, Disconnect.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements as instructed.
